# BSA Merit Badge Workbook Generator

A universal, AI-powered tool to convert raw Boy Scouts of America (BSA) requirements into professional, fillable PDF workbooks.

## Core Features
- **AI Requirements Parsing**: Converts hierarchical text (1.a.i) into structured document trees.
- **Dynamic Theming**: Automatically applies context-aware color palettes based on badge subject.
- **Smart Components**: Generates checklists, comparison tables, and interactive response areas.
- **Fillable PDF Output**: Injects interactive text fields for digital completion.
- **DOCX Export**: High-fidelity Word document generation for custom editing.

## Technical Details
- **Frontend**: Next.js 15, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion.
- **Backend**: Python Vercel Functions, ReportLab PDF Engine.
- **AI Model**: Gemini 2.0 Flash.

## Links
- Homepage: https://bsaworkbooks.com
- Badge Library: https://bsaworkbooks.com/library
